pi_items.source: Task description (step 2): 'enter "Pest check - aphids on tomatoes" as the Name'
Task description (step 3): 'change it to "Observation"'; FarmOS documentation confirms Observation is a standard log type in farmOS Field Kit app
Task description (step 5): 'Toggle the "Done" switch to OFF (unchecked)' indicates the log should not be marked as done

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a new Observation log entry in the farmOS Field Kit Android app with the name 'Pest check - aphids on tomatoes' and the Done flag set to false (unchecked). All metadata values are verified against the explicit task description instructions. The farmOS Field Kit app is a real, open-source mobile application that supports multiple log types including Observation, Activity, Input, and Harvest logs for farm management and record-keeping. Data is synthetic, created during task execution by the agent.
